title: psychotria fleuryana
intro: Psychotria fleuryana, also known as Fleury's wild coffee or wild coffee tree, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria fleuryana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Psychotria fleuryana typically involve drying and processing the leaves to create teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
